name: qalibur
description: Agentic QE platform — 10 AI agents automate the full QE lifecycle
author: pragatig25

scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:demo: cd frontend && VITE_MODE=demo npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
